summary: David, you've lost 45.6 pounds since starting—that's a major accomplishment and puts you well on your way. This past two weeks showed a slower pace at 0.9 pounds, which is actually pretty normal and sustainable; you're averaging 0.45 pounds weekly, which is exactly the kind of steady progress that sticks. You logged 12 days out of 14, so you're staying engaged with your data, and that consistency matters more than any single week's number. Next week, let's focus on those two unlogged days—keeping your Dexcom and Garmin insights visible every single day will help you spot patterns and keep momentum going. You're doing the hard work, and it's showing.
